message:
fix: remove hardcoded SIMD templates from logic_table

BREAKING: Removed function name → SIMD template mappings that were
bypassing actual Python compilation:

Removed:
- dot_product, dot → SIMD template
- cosine_sim, cosine_similarity → SIMD template
- l2_distance, euclidean_distance → SIMD template
- batch_cosine_sim, batch_l2_distance, batch_dot_product
- batch_normalize, l2_normalize
- sum_vectors, mean_vectors

Now metal0 will ACTUALLY compile Python for loops to Zig code
instead of substituting pre-written SIMD templates.

This makes @logic_table honest - Python code is actually compiled,
not just used as a label for template lookup.
